description: VERIFIED LIVE: Duolingo via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token). Look up a user by id or username — streak, total XP, courses and progress — cookie-only on the 2017-06-30 API. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account: user-by-id and user-by-username both returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: duolingo_user
tools.description: A user's profile and learning progress by numeric id (streak, totalXp, courses). VERIFIED.

tools.name: duolingo_user_by_name
tools.description: Look up users by username. VERIFIED.
